description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Select an annual base TV plan that includes over 100 channels, costs under $20 per month on an annual billing cycle, and proceed to the checkout page with it selected.
tasks.name: Select an annual base TV plan that includes over 100 channels, costs under $20 per month on an annual billing cycle, and proceed to the checkout page with it selected.
tasks.description: Select an annual base TV plan that includes over 100 channels, costs under $20 per month on an annual billing cycle, and proceed to the checkout page with it selected.

tasks.instruction: Add a sports add-on that costs under $10 per month and includes at least five HD sports channels to your plan, then save the updated configuration.
tasks.name: Add a sports add-on that costs under $10 per month and includes at least five HD sports channels to your plan, then save the updated configuration.
tasks.description: Add a sports add-on that costs under $10 per month and includes at least five HD sports channels to your plan, then save the updated configuration.

tasks.instruction: Add to your favorites one English-language movie channel, one Spanish-language news channel, and one kids channel rated for all ages, then open your favorites list.
tasks.name: Add to your favorites one English-language movie channel, one Spanish-language news channel, and one kids channel rated for all ages, then open your favorites list.

tasks.instruction: Sign in to the account, create a 4-digit parental PIN, set the maximum allowed content rating to TV-14, and require that PIN to complete any purchases.
tasks.name: Sign in to the account, create a 4-digit parental PIN, set the maximum allowed content rating to TV-14, and require that PIN to complete any purchases.
tasks.description: Sign in to the account, create a 4-digit parental PIN, set the maximum allowed content rating to TV-14, and require that PIN to complete any purchases.

tasks.instruction: Compare at least two TV plans that cost under $30 per month and switch your subscription to the one that offers the highest number of simultaneous streams, applying the change immediately.
tasks.name: Compare at least two TV plans that cost under $30 per month and switch your subscription to the one that offers the highest number of simultaneous streams, applying the change immediately.
tasks.description: Compare at least two TV plans that cost under $30 per month and switch your subscription to the one that offers the highest number of simultaneous streams, applying the change immediately.

tasks.instruction: Using the TV guide, schedule a recording for a sports program that starts at 8:00 PM on the upcoming Friday and set it to be kept for 7 days.
tasks.name: Using the TV guide, schedule a recording for a sports program that starts at 8:00 PM on the upcoming Friday and set it to be kept for 7 days.
tasks.description: Using the TV guide, schedule a recording for a sports program that starts at 8:00 PM on the upcoming Friday and set it to be kept for 7 days.

tasks.instruction: Switch your billing to annual, apply an active promo code that gives 20% off eligible annual plans, then select an annual plan whose discounted yearly total is under $200 and save the subscription changes.
tasks.name: Switch your billing to annual, apply an active promo code that gives 20% off eligible annual plans, then select an annual plan whose discounted yearly total is under $200 and save the subscription changes.

tasks.instruction: Search for a nature-related documentary series, filter results to 4K series, sort by popularity, and start playing the first episode of the top result.
